# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: microservices-access
  namespace: default # Or the namespace where your services are
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-service # Apply this policy to services with label app: my-service
  rules:
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/sa-frontend"] # Allow traffic from service account sa-frontend in 'default' namespace
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/products", "/api/v1/products/*"] # Allow GET requests to /api/v1/products and its sub-paths
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v1/orders"] # Allow POST requests to /api/v1/orders
  - from:
    - source:
        principals: ["cluster.local/ns/default/sa/sa-backend"] # Allow traffic from service account sa-backend
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "PUT", "DELETE"] # Allow GET, PUT, DELETE requests
        paths: ["/api/v2/admin/*"] # To any path under /api/v2/admin/
    - operation:
        methods: ["POST"]
        paths: ["/api/v2/reports"] # And POST requests to /api/v2/reports
